description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a deep blue-gray fabric, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The sofa includes four loose, square cushions—two on the backrest and two on the sides—providing both comfort and a casual, inviting appearance. The armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to a clean, geometric profile. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs, slightly elevating it above the ground and enhancing its contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric with a matte finish, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with foam padding. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern parks, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A modern, blue-gray fabric sofa with four loose cushions, straight armrests, and slim black metal legs. Its clean, boxy design and matte upholstery give it a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, two back cushions, and two side cushions, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth, armrest thickness, and the arrangement of cushions along the side and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the clean, unadorned back panel, with both back legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, cushion arrangement, and sofa depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four loose, square cushions—two on the backrest and two on the sides—uniform in size and freely arranged atop two large seat cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide armrests at seat height, boxy profile, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the sofa, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, cylindrical black metal legs positioned at each corner, slightly angled outward, fully exposed and elevating the sofa above the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose, square cushions resting against it, continuous and unsegmented with a clean, flat top edge.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue-gray fabric with a smooth, tightly woven texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
